arts.sum: Listen to live audio commentary as part of Foxes Hub's Matchday Live coverage of Arsenal versus Leicester City. The Foxes' men's team head to Emirates Stadium on Saturday (3pm kick-off) with a first Premier League win in their sights.

arts.ttl: Newcastle winger to snub transfer interest and sign new deal
arts.sum: Anthony Gordon has reached an agreement with Newcastle United over a new contract. Gordon has emerged as an integral part of Eddie Howe’s side since signing from Everton in a £45m deal in January 2023. The winger was named as Newcastle’s Player of the Season for 2023/24 after an excellent first full season at […] The post Newcastle winger to snub transfer interest and sign new deal first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Joleon Lescott says Bukayo Saka did something 'simple' in England camp that made him realise he's world-class
arts.sum: Lee Carsley is the current caretaker England manager as the Three Lions enter a new era. The England team is being coached by a whole...

arts.ttl: Football transfer rumours: Real Madrid turn to Dalot; Arsenal enter €150m race
arts.sum: Real Madrid will move for Manchester United full-back Diogo Dalot if they are unable to bring in Trent Alexander-Arnold from Liverpool. Barcelona are not believed to be working on a deal to bring in Aston Villa striker Jhon Duran, contrary to reports in Spain.

arts.ttl: Arsenal given major Newcastle transfer boost as Pep Guardiola copies Mikel Arteta's January plan - Jake Stokes
arts.sum: football.london says: "He would certainly be a good signing for Arsenal – he'd provide Gabriel Martinelli with lots of healthy competition for a place on the left wing in Mikel Arteta's side. According to TBR Football, Ruben van Bommel has attracted interest from Arsenal and Manchester City after an impressive start to the Eredivisie season.

arts.ttl: Every word Arsenal boss Arteta said on Nwaneri future, Sterling display and Jack Porter debut
arts.sum: On Ethan's first goals for the club and with the second one, I think there was probably a moment where he could have passed, but he was confident to shoot. Jürgen Klopp said one time that he dreamed of having a team full of academy players.

arts.ttl: Arsenal injury latest before Leicester as Mikel Arteta waits on eight players
arts.sum: Arsenal's captain has missed recent games due to an ankle injury sustained while in action for Norway during the international break earlier this month. The Arsenal No.1 was seen limping and with a bandage on his knee following the draw with City on Sunday and was left out of the squad for Wednesday's midweek win over Bolton.

arts.ttl: What Declan Rice did after Ethan Nwaneri Arsenal goal as next step for Jack Porter revealed
arts.sum: His teammates looked to carry him through the night too, with Jorginho giving him specific instructions on where to play goal kicks. The 17-year-old had made three appearances off the bench by the time Wednesday night came about, but this was his first start.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta has been shown how to solve £65m Arsenal dilemma ahead of Leicester
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta was able to hand out four first team debuts, get minutes into the legs of players like Riccardo Calafiori and Gabriel Jesus, and introduce Raheem Sterling to the Emirates Stadium crowd in a convincing 5-1 over Bolton. Arsenal remain slightly short in the midfield position going into their match with Leicester City.

arts.ttl: Arsenal guaranteed to have at least two players back vs Leicester as Arteta waits on Raya injury
arts.sum: While it was a great night for Porter, concerns still remain over Raya's availability for Leicester. "We gave the opportunity to quite a lot of academy players, they responded really well and it's just so fulfilling to see their faces, their reaction, how much it means to them," Mikel Arteta said after the game .
